words.definition: A projecting part of a rampart or other fortification.

words.definition: A mountebank, someone who addresses crowds in the street; (especially), an itinerant seller of medicines or drugs.

words.definition: Done or kept in secret, sometimes to conceal an illicit or improper purpose.
The act of turning or whirling, as around a fixed center; a circular or spiral motion; motion about an axis; rotation; revolution.

words.definition: Intended to gain approval or favor; sycophantic.
Obedient or attentive to an excessive or servile degree.
Shiny and colourful, and thus pleasing to the eye.

words.definition: Beyond alteration, criticism, or interference, especially due to religious sanction; inviolable.

words.definition: (of food) Having a thick, semi-solid consistency; glutinous; heavy on the stomach.

words.definition: To thwart or stump; to cause to fail or to leave hopelessly puzzled, confused, or stuck.
words.example: If writing dates has you stymied at times, it is probably for one of two reasons. https//www.grammarly.com/blog/how-to-write-dates/
